words.exampleArabic: أَبْرَمَ النَّادِي صَفْقَةَ الِانْتِقَالِ بِمَبْلَغٍ قِيَاسِيٍّ.
words.exampleBs: Klub je sklopio rekordni transferni dogovor.
words.exampleEn: The club concluded the transfer deal for a record fee.

words.exampleArabic: وَقَّعَ اللَّاعِبُ عَقْدًا جَدِيدًا لِمُدَّةِ ثَلَاثِ سَنَوَاتٍ.
words.exampleBs: Igrač je potpisao novi ugovor na tri godine.
words.exampleEn: The player signed a new contract for three years.

words.exampleArabic: تُقَدِّمُ شَرِكَاتُ كُبْرَى رِعَايَةً مَالِيَّةً ضَخْمَةً لِلْأَنْدِيَةِ الرِّيَاضِيَّةِ.
words.exampleBs: Velike kompanije pružaju ogromno finansijsko sponzorstvo sportskim klubovima.
words.exampleEn: Large companies provide massive financial sponsorship to sports clubs.

words.exampleArabic: يَتَفَاوَضُ الْوَكِيلُ الرِّيَاضِيُّ عَنِ اللَّاعِبِ لِلْحُصُولِ عَلَى أَفْضَلِ الشُّرُوطِ.
words.exampleBs: Sportski agent pregovara u ime igrača kako bi dobio najbolje uvjete.
words.exampleEn: The sports agent negotiates on behalf of the player to secure the best terms.

words.exampleArabic: يَتَابِعُ الْمَلَايِينُ مُبَارَيَاتِ كَأْسِ الْعَالَمِ مِنْ جَمِيعِ أَنْحَاءِ الْكُرَةِ الْأَرْضِيَّةِ.
words.exampleBs: Milioni prate utakmice Svjetskog prvaka iz svih dijelova svijeta.
words.exampleEn: Millions follow the World Cup matches from all corners of the globe.

words.exampleArabic: تَجْمَعُ الْأَلْعَابُ الْأُولِمْبِيَّةُ رِيَاضِيِّي الْعَالَمِ كُلَّ أَرْبَعِ سَنَوَاتٍ.
words.exampleBs: Olimpijske igre okupljaju sportaše svijeta svake četiri godine.
words.exampleEn: The Olympic Games bring together the world's athletes every four years.

words.exampleArabic: احْتَفَلَ الْفَرِيقُ بِفَوْزِهِ بِالْبُطُولَةِ لِلْمَرَّةِ الثَّالِثَةِ تَوَالِيًا.
words.exampleBs: Tim je proslavio osvajanje prvenstava treći put zaredom.
words.exampleEn: The team celebrated winning the championship for the third consecutive time.

words.exampleArabic: يَضُمُّ الدَّوْرِيُّ عِشْرِينَ فَرِيقًا مِنْ أَرْجَاءِ الْبَلَدِ.
words.exampleBs: Liga obuhvata dvadeset timova iz cijele zemlje.
words.exampleEn: The league comprises twenty teams from across the country.

words.exampleArabic: أُقِيمَتِ الْبُطُولَةُ الْإِقْلِيمِيَّةُ عَلَى مَدَى أُسْبُوعَيْنِ.
words.exampleBs: Regionalni turnir je održan u trajanju od dva tjedna.
words.exampleEn: The regional tournament was held over two weeks.

words.exampleArabic: تَأَهَّلَ الْفَرِيقُ إِلَى الدَّوْرِ قَبْلَ النِّهَائِيِّ بَعْدَ فَوْزٍ مُثِيرٍ.
words.exampleBs: Tim se plasirao u polufinale nakon uzbudljive pobjede.
words.exampleEn: The team qualified for the semifinal after an exciting victory.

words.exampleArabic: حُسِمَتِ الْمُبَارَاةُ عَبْرَ رَكْلَاتِ التَّرْجِيحِ بَعْدَ التَّعَادُلِ.
words.exampleBs: Utakmica je odlučena penaltima nakon neriješenog rezultata.
words.exampleEn: The match was decided by a penalty shootout after a draw.

words.exampleArabic: أَلْغَتْ تِقْنِيَّةُ مُرَاجَعَةِ الْحَكَمِ بِالْفِيدِيُو الْهَدَفَ بَعْدَ مُرَاجَعَةٍ دَقِيقَةٍ.
words.exampleBs: VAR je poništio gol nakon detaljnog pregleda.
words.exampleEn: The VAR cancelled the goal after a detailed review.

words.exampleArabic: تُحَسِّنُ اللِّيَاقَةُ الْقَلْبِيَّةُ الصِّحَّةَ الْعَامَّةَ وَتُطِيلُ الْعُمُرَ.
words.exampleBs: Kardiovaskularna sposobnost poboljšava opće zdravlje i produžuje životni vijek.
words.exampleEn: Cardiovascular fitness improves general health and extends lifespan.

words.exampleArabic: يَبْنِي عَدَّاءُو الْمَارَاثُونِ تَحَمُّلَهُمْ عَبْرَ سَنَوَاتٍ مِنَ التَّدْرِيبِ.
words.exampleBs: Maratonci grade svoju izdržljivost kroz godine treninga.
words.exampleEn: Marathon runners build their endurance through years of training.

words.exampleArabic: تَزِيدُ تَمَارِينُ الْيُوغَا مِنْ مُرُونَةِ الْجِسْمِ وَتُقَلِّلُ مِنَ التَّوَتُّرِ.
words.exampleBs: Yoga vježbe povećavaju fleksibilnost tijela i smanjuju napetost.
words.exampleEn: Yoga exercises increase body flexibility and reduce tension.

words.exampleArabic: يَرْتَفِعُ مُعَدَّلُ التَّمَثُّلِ الْغِذَائِيِّ خِلَالَ التَّمَارِينِ الشَّدِيدَةِ.
words.exampleBs: Stopa metabolizma raste tokom intenzivnih vježbi.
words.exampleEn: The metabolic rate rises during intense exercise.

words.exampleArabic: تُؤَثِّرُ التَّغْذِيَةُ الرِّيَاضِيَّةُ تَأْثِيرًا مُبَاشِرًا عَلَى الْأَدَاءِ.
words.exampleBs: Sportska prehrana ima direktan utjecaj na sportske rezultate.
words.exampleEn: Sports nutrition has a direct impact on performance.

words.exampleArabic: يُخَصِّصُ الرِّيَاضِيُّونَ وَقْتًا كَافِيًا لِلتَّعَافِي بَيْنَ الْجَلَسَاتِ التَّدْرِيبِيَّةِ.
words.exampleBs: Sportaši odvajaju dovoljno vremena za oporavak između treninga.
words.exampleEn: Athletes allocate sufficient time for recovery between training sessions.

words.exampleArabic: خَضَعَ اللَّاعِبُ الْمُصَابُ لِجَلَسَاتِ الْعِلَاجِ الطَّبِيعِيِّ لِمُدَّةِ شَهْرٍ.
words.exampleBs: Povrijeđeni igrač je prošao sesije fizioterapije u trajanju od mjesec dana.
words.exampleEn: The injured player underwent physiotherapy sessions for one month.

words.exampleArabic: يُؤَدِّي اسْتِخْدَامُ الْمُنَشِّطَاتِ إِلَى إِيقَافِ الرِّيَاضِيِّ.
words.exampleBs: Upotreba dopinga dovodi do suspenzije sportaša.
words.exampleEn: The use of doping leads to the suspension of the athlete.

words.exampleArabic: تَسْعَى الْأَبْحَاثُ الْعِلْمِيَّةُ إِلَى تَحْسِينِ أَدَاءِ الرِّيَاضِيِّينَ بِطُرُقٍ مَشْرُوعَةٍ.
words.exampleBs: Naučna istraživanja nastoje poboljšati sportske performanse na legitiman način.
words.exampleEn: Scientific research seeks to improve athlete performance through legitimate means.

words.exampleArabic: اخْتَارَ الْمُدَرِّبُ تَشْكِيلَةً هُجُومِيَّةً لِمُوَاجَهَةِ الْفَرِيقِ الْمُنَافِسِ.
words.exampleBs: Trener je odabrao napadačku formaciju za suočavanje s protivničkim timom.
words.exampleEn: The coach chose an attacking formation to face the opposing team.

words.exampleArabic: تَغَيَّرَ تَكْتِيكُ الْفَرِيقِ بَعْدَ تَلَقِّيهِ الْهَدَفَ الْأَوَّلَ.
words.exampleBs: Taktika tima se promijenila nakon što su primili prvi gol.
words.exampleEn: The team's tactics changed after conceding the first goal.

words.exampleArabic: وَضَعَ طَاقِمُ الْمُدَرِّبِينَ اسْتِرَاتِيجِيَّةً مُفَصَّلَةً لِنِهَائِيِّ الْبُطُولَةِ.
words.exampleBs: Stručni štab izradio je detaljnu strategiju za finale prvenstava.
words.exampleEn: The coaching staff drew up a detailed strategy for the championship final.

words.exampleArabic: نَجَحَ الْفَرِيقُ فِي تَسْجِيلِ هَدَفٍ عَبْرَ هُجُومٍ مُرْتَدٍّ سَرِيعٍ.
words.exampleBs: Tim je uspio postići gol brzim kontranapadom.
words.exampleEn: The team succeeded in scoring a goal through a swift counterattack.

words.exampleArabic: يَعْتَمِدُ الْفَرِيقُ عَلَى أُسْلُوبِ الضَّغْطِ الْعَالِي لِاسْتِعَادَةِ الْكُرَةِ.
words.exampleBs: Tim se oslanja na visoki pressing kako bi vratio loptu.
words.exampleEn: The team relies on the high press to regain possession of the ball.

words.exampleArabic: بَلَغَ الِاسْتِحْوَاذُ سَبْعِينَ بِالْمِئَةِ لِصَالِحِ الْفَرِيقِ الْمُضِيفِ.
words.exampleBs: Posjed lopte dostigao je sedamdeset posto u korist domaćeg tima.
words.exampleEn: Possession reached seventy percent in favour of the home team.

words.exampleArabic: صَمَدَ الْخَطُّ الدِّفَاعِيُّ أَمَامَ الضَّغْطِ الشَّدِيدِ مِنَ الْمُنَافِسِ.
words.exampleBs: Obrambena linija je izdržala snažan pritisak suparnika.
words.exampleEn: The defensive line withstood the strong pressure from the opponent.

words.exampleArabic: يَجْذِبُ التَّعْلِيقُ الرِّيَاضِيُّ الْمُتَحَمِّسُ الْمَلَايِينَ مِنَ الْمُشَاهِدِينَ.
words.exampleBs: Entuzijastičan sportski komentar privlači milione gledatelja.
words.exampleEn: Enthusiastic sports commentary attracts millions of viewers.

words.exampleArabic: اشْتَرَتِ الْقَنَاةُ حُقُوقَ الْبَثِّ بِمَبَالِغَ طَائِلَةٍ.
words.exampleBs: Kanal je kupio prava prijenosa za ogromne iznose.
words.exampleEn: The channel purchased broadcast rights for enormous sums.

words.exampleArabic: تَتَمِيَّزُ ثَقَافَةُ الْمُشَجِّعِينَ فِي هَذَا الدَّوْرِيِّ بِالتَّنَوُّعِ وَالْحَيَوِيَّةِ.
words.exampleBs: Kultura navijača u ovoj ligi odlikuje se raznolikošću i živošću.
words.exampleEn: Fan culture in this league is distinguished by diversity and vitality.

words.exampleArabic: تَتَطَلَّبُ الصِّحَافَةُ الرِّيَاضِيَّةُ مَعْرِفَةً عَمِيقَةً بِعَالَمِ الرِّيَاضَةِ.
words.exampleBs: Sportsko novinarstvo zahtijeva duboko poznavanje sportskog svijeta.
words.exampleEn: Sports journalism requires in-depth knowledge of the world of sport.

words.exampleArabic: يَجْرِي تَحْلِيلُ الْمُبَارَاةِ بَعْدَ كُلِّ مُوَاجَهَةٍ لِتَحْسِينِ الْأَدَاءِ.
words.exampleBs: Analiza utakmice se provodi nakon svake utakmice radi poboljšanja igre.
words.exampleEn: Match analysis is conducted after every fixture to improve performance.

words.exampleArabic: يَسْتَغْرِقُ إِعْدَادُ الرِّيَاضِيِّ لِلْمَارَاثُونِ أَشْهُرًا مِنَ التَّدْرِيبِ الشَّاقِّ.
words.exampleBs: Priprema sportaša za maraton traje nekoliko mjeseci napornog treninga.
words.exampleEn: Preparing an athlete for the marathon takes months of intensive training.

words.exampleArabic: يَجْمَعُ سِبَاقُ الثَّلَاثِيَّاتِ بَيْنَ السِّبَاحَةِ وَالدَّرَّاجَةِ وَالْجَرْيِ.
words.exampleBs: Triatlon kombinira plivanje, biciklizam i trčanje.
words.exampleEn: The triathlon combines swimming, cycling and running.

words.exampleArabic: يُعَدُّ الْعُشَارِيُّ مِنْ أَصْعَبِ الْمُنَافَسَاتِ الْأَثْلَيْطِيَّةِ عَلَى الْإِطْلَاقِ.
words.exampleBs: Desetoboj smatra se jednim od najtežih atletskih takmičenja uopće.
words.exampleEn: The decathlon is considered one of the most demanding athletic competitions of all.

words.exampleArabic: اسْتَقْطَبَتْ جَائِزَةُ الْغِرَانِ بْرِي جُمْهُورًا وَاسِعًا مِنْ عُشَّاقِ السِّبَاقِ.
words.exampleBs: Gran Prix je privukao veliku publiku ljubitelja utrka.
words.exampleEn: The Grand Prix attracted a wide audience of racing enthusiasts.

words.exampleArabic: تَصَدَّرَ اللَّاعِبُ التَّصْنِيفَ الْعَالَمِيَّ لِلْعَامِ الثَّانِي عَلَى التَّوَالِي.
words.exampleBs: Igrač je predvodio svjetsku rang listu drugu godinu zaredom.
words.exampleEn: The player topped the world ranking for the second consecutive year.

words.exampleArabic: يَحْصُلُ اللَّاعِبُ الْمُصَنَّفُ عَلَى مِيزَةٍ فِي قَرَعَةِ الْبُطُولَةِ.
words.exampleBs: Nositelj žrijeba ima prednost pri raspoređivanju na turniru.
words.exampleEn: The seeded player has an advantage in the tournament draw.

words.exampleArabic: أَكَّدَ الْمُنْتَخَبُ تَأَهُّلَهُ إِلَى نِهَائِيَّاتِ الْبُطُولَةِ.
words.exampleBs: Reprezentacija je potvrdila kvalifikaciju za završnicu turnira.
words.exampleEn: The national team confirmed its qualification for the tournament finals.

words.exampleArabic: تُجَسِّدُ الرُّوحُ الرِّيَاضِيَّةُ قِيَمَ الِاحْتِرَامِ وَالنَّزَاهَةِ فِي الرِّيَاضَةِ.
words.exampleBs: Sportski duh utjelovljuje vrijednosti poštovanja i poštenja u sportu.
words.exampleEn: Sportsmanship embodies the values of respect and integrity in sport.

words.exampleArabic: تَنَامَتِ الرِّيَاضَةُ الْإِلِكْتْرُونِيَّةُ بِسُرْعَةٍ لِتُصْبِحَ صِنَاعَةً عَالَمِيَّةً.
words.exampleBs: Esport je brzo narastao da bi postao globalna industrija.
words.exampleEn: Esport has grown rapidly to become a global industry.

words.exampleArabic: أَبْعَدَتِ الْإِصَابَةُ الرِّيَاضِيَّةُ الْحَارِسَ عَنِ الْمِيدَانِ لِثَلَاثَةِ أَشْهُرٍ.
words.exampleBs: Sportska povreda udaljila je golmana s terena na tri mjeseca.
words.exampleEn: The sports injury kept the goalkeeper off the pitch for three months.

words.exampleArabic: يَتَعَلَّمُ الرِّيَاضِيُّونَ التَّعَامُلَ مَعَ الصِّرَاعِ النَّفْسِيِّ فِي الْمُنَافَسَاتِ الْكُبْرَى.
words.exampleBs: Sportaši uče nositi se s psihičkim pritiskom na velikim takmičenjima.
words.exampleEn: Athletes learn to deal with mental pressure at major competitions.

words.exampleArabic: كَانَ السِّبَاقُ الرِّيَاضِيُّ مُثِيرًا وَشَهِدَ مُنَافَسَةً شَدِيدَةً حَتَّى اللَّحْظَةِ الْأَخِيرَةِ.
words.exampleBs: Sportska utrka je bila uzbudljiva i svjedočila je ostroj borbi do posljednjeg trenutka.
words.exampleEn: The race was thrilling and witnessed fierce competition until the very last moment.
